refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time for the load→travel→dump cycle by optimizing load handling, travel efficiency, and dump operations.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and high-level; decomposing it into sub-functions allows targeted design parameters and clearer verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure cycle time components (load, travel, dump) individually and in aggregate under representative duty cycles and site conditions to verify p95 ≤ CT_target.

candidate_dps: Optimized travel path planning and control
selected_dp.selected_dp: Automated load handling system; Optimized travel path planning and control; Efficient dump mechanism control

potential_sources: Load handling affects travel start time
coupling_check.notes: The selected DPs are logically decoupled by function but require coordination at the system level; coupling is manageable with clear interfaces.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate site and duty cycle data for optimization
Risk that travel path optimization may conflict with safety constraints
Risk that automation complexity may increase failure modes
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Monitor integration points closely to ensure timing coordination and safety compliance.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical components responsible for load handling, travel control, and dump mechanism

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle sends cycle time and status data to NGHE Solution

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle receives operational commands from NGHE Solution

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle sends safety alerts to Safety Services

module_containment_scores.notes: Vehicle contains core physical functions for cycle time optimization; low diffusion risk.
NGHE Solution manages overall coordination but does not directly implement physical cycle time functions.
Teleoperation module is peripheral to cycle time optimization; higher diffusion risk if assigned here.
Safety Services focus on safety alerts, not cycle time functions.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning cycle time optimization DPs to Vehicle module centralizes physical control and minimizes diffusion of responsibility.
containment_risks: Potential complexity overload in Vehicle module
Coordination with NGHE Solution and Safety Services must be well-defined to avoid interface mismatches
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interface contracts and consider modular subcomponents within Vehicle if complexity grows.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement is clear and sub-FRs are logically decomposed; selected DPs address each sub-FR with manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk by centralizing cycle time functions in Vehicle
Interface complexity manageable with known interfaces
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module is the best containment candidate for physical cycle time functions; interfaces to NGHE Solution and Safety Services are well-defined.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed by measuring cycle times and monitoring telemetry and safety alerts through assigned interfaces.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of cycle time functions to Vehicle module with supporting interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Monitor integration complexity between Vehicle and NGHE Solution
Ensure safety constraints are integrated into travel path optimization

decision.justification: The functional decomposition, DP selection, and IM assignment are consistent, with manageable coupling and clear interfaces. Verification approaches are feasible and risks are identified with mitigation paths.

revise.why: Current level decomposition and assignments are sound; proceed to next level refinement.

assumptions: Site and duty cycle data are accurate and available
Safety constraints will be integrated in travel optimization
Vehicle module can handle added complexity
open_risks: Integration complexity between Vehicle and NGHE Solution
Potential safety conflicts in travel path optimization
evidence_needed: Cycle time measurements under representative conditions
